name: Apple-Sausage Oven Pancake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Grease an 8x8x2-inch baking dish.
3. Brown sausages according to package directions.
4. Beat Bisquick, cinnamon, milk, and egg together with a hand beater until smooth.
5. Stir in chopped pared apple.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared dish and arrange the sausages on top.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until light brown.
8. Serve with maple syrup.
